description: yang-toolkit observability hooks: log tool calls, track current agent, append ledger summaries, and passively record nested-folder CLAUDE.md gap candidates.
_comment_planned: TODO: add UserPromptSubmit (capture intent), PostToolUseFailure (capture failures), Setup (warm directory create) once base flow is verified.

hooks._comment: Seed .git/info/exclude (local, per-clone, never committed) so the consuming repo ignores yang-toolkit's transient .claude/ state (state/, logs/, sessions/, dashboards, locks) without editing its committed .gitignore. Keeps ledger.jsonl + plans/*.md trackable. Idempotent (marker-keyed). Opt-out: HARNESS_DISABLE_GIT_EXCLUDE=1.

PostToolUse._comment: Passive CLAUDE.md gap detector: on Edit/Write/MultiEdit in a nested folder, score the folder against the heuristic and append a pending candidate to .claude/state/claude-md-candidates.jsonl. NEVER generates a CLAUDE.md -- /claude-md-gaps handles that, gated on user confirmation.

Test-parity reminder: when production code is edited but no test mirror has been touched in this session, inject a one-line nudge into Claude's next-turn context. Opt-out via HARNESS_DISABLE_TEST_PARITY=1. Dedupes per (file, day).

Doc-parity reminder: when a yang-toolkit command/skill definition is edited but the command is not listed in every doc surface (README inventory + cheat-sheet, en/zh usage manuals), nudge Claude to sync the docs. Checks coverage by name only -- never rewrites the curated/translated prose. Standalone report: hooks/doc-parity-check.sh --report. Opt-out via HARNESS_DISABLE_DOC_PARITY=1. Dedupes per (command, day).

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Reset current-agent to 'main' at the start of each user turn, so statusline/dashboard/Stop don't show a stale subagent name. SubagentStop overwrites it within the turn if a subagent runs.

Stop._comment: Completion signal: play a short sound (and optional desktop notification) so you can tell which of several parallel sessions just finished. Best-effort, never blocks. Opt out with HARNESS_DISABLE_NOTIFY=1; override the sound with HARNESS_NOTIFY_SOUND=/path; enable a desktop notification with HARNESS_NOTIFY_DESKTOP=1.
